https://github.com/unslothai/unsloth.name: unslothai/unsloth
https://github.com/unslothai/unsloth.description: Fine-tuning & Reinforcement Learning for LLMs. 🦥 Train OpenAI gpt-oss, DeepSeek, Qwen, Llama, Gemma, TTS 2x faster with 70% less VRAM.

applicable_improvements.title: Enable Padding-Free Training
applicable_improvements.description: Reduces memory fragmentation and improves training throughput by eliminating padding tokens during sequence processing.

applicable_improvements.title: Implement Sample Packing
applicable_improvements.description: Increases data utilization by combining multiple samples into a single sequence, improving GPU efficiency.
applicable_improvements.code_hint: Enable packing via configure_sample_packing(True) and adjust max_seq_length

applicable_improvements.title: Optimize Gradient Accumulation
applicable_improvements.description: Adjusts gradient accumulation steps to balance memory usage and training stability for large batch sizes.

applicable_improvements.title: LoRA Fine-Tuning Configuration
applicable_improvements.description: Enables efficient parameter-efficient fine-tuning through LoRA adapters for better resource utilization.
applicable_improvements.code_hint: Set training_type='lora' and configure lora_r, lora_alpha parameters

applicable_improvements.title: Vision-Optimized Data Collation
applicable_improvements.description: Implements specialized collation for vision data to handle multimodal inputs in RAG systems.
applicable_improvements.code_hint: Use UnslothVisionDataCollator with appropriate vision_all_linear configuration

https://github.com/hiyouga/LLaMA-Factory.name: hiyouga/LlamaFactory
https://github.com/hiyouga/LLaMA-Factory.description: Unified Efficient Fine-Tuning of 100+ LLMs & VLMs (ACL 2024)

applicable_improvements.title: Dynamic Prompt Tuning for RAG
applicable_improvements.description: Introduce trainable prompt embeddings to adaptively align retrieved documents with model context, improving relevance and reducing hallucination.
applicable_improvements.code_hint: Add prompt_encoder = nn.Embedding(128, 768) and integrate with retrieval outputs during training

applicable_improvements.title: Efficient Retrieval with FAISS
applicable_improvements.description: Implement FAISS-based vector similarity search for faster document retrieval during generation phase.

applicable_improvements.title: Multi-Modal Data Augmentation
applicable_improvements.description: Add cross-modal contrastive loss to improve alignment between text and associated images/audio in training data.

applicable_improvements.title: Adaptive Learning Rate Scheduler
applicable_improvements.description: Implement cosine decay with warmup to optimize convergence during fine-tuning.

applicable_improvements.title: Enhanced Evaluation Metrics
applicable_improvements.description: Add BERTScore and MMR metrics for more accurate evaluation of generated responses.
applicable_improvements.code_hint:
from bert_score import BERTScorer
scorer = BERTScorer(lang='zh')

https://github.com/huggingface/trl.name: huggingface/trl
https://github.com/huggingface/trl.description: Train transformer language models with reinforcement learning.
https://github.com/huggingface/trl.readme_summary:
# TRL - Transformers Reinforcement Learning

A comprehensive library to post-train foundation mode
key_patterns: Integrate DPO with LoRA for Alignment

applicable_improvements.title: Integrate DPO with LoRA for Alignment
applicable_improvements.description: TRL's DPO trainer can be combined with LoRA to fine-tune retrieval models with alignment objectives, improving relevance without full parameter updates. This leverages TRL's reinforcement learning capabilities for better query-document alignment.
applicable_improvements.code_hint: Wrap LoRA model in DPO trainer: trainer = DPOTrainer(model=loramodel, args=dpo_args)

applicable_improvements.title: Synthetic Data Generation for Retrieval
applicable_improvements.description: Use TRL's dataset generation scripts (e.g., generate_toolcall_dataset.py) to create synthetic question-answer pairs for training embedding models and improving ChromaDB retrieval accuracy.

applicable_improvements.title: Cross-Encoder Evaluation Metrics
applicable_improvements.description: Adopt TRL's evaluation utilities (from test_rewards.py) to measure cross-encoder reranker performance with metrics like pairwise accuracy and ranking loss.

applicable_improvements.title: Experimental Trainer Optimization
applicable_improvements.description: Explore TRL's experimental/new_trainer.py for potential optimizations in distributed training or mixed-precision support that could accelerate RAG system training.
applicable_improvements.code_hint: Implement new training loop: trainer = NewTrainer(accelerator=accel, args=training_args)

applicable_improvements.title: Compatibility Layer for Older PyTorch
applicable_improvements.description: Use TRL's _compat.py strategies to ensure LoRA and DPO components work with older PyTorch versions, improving deployment flexibility.
applicable_improvements.code_hint: Add version checks: if torch.__version__ < '2.0': use legacy LoRA implementation

https://github.com/EleutherAI/lm-evaluat.name: EleutherAI/lm-evaluation-harness
https://github.com/EleutherAI/lm-evaluat.description: A framework for few-shot evaluation of language models.
https://github.com/EleutherAI/lm-evaluat.readme_summary:
# Language Model Evaluation Harness

[![DOI](https://zenodo.org/badge/DOI/10.5281/zenodo.10256836.svg)](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.10256836)

---

## Latest News 📣
- [2025/12] **CLI refactored** with subcommands (`run`, `ls`, `validate`) and YAML config file support via `--config`. See the [CLI Reference](./docs/interface.md) and [Configuration Guide](./docs/config_files.md).
- [2025/12] **Lighter install**: Base package no longer includes `transformers`/`torch`. Install model backends separ
key_patterns: Optimize Model Loading with HF Transfer

applicable_improvements.title: Optimize Model Loading with HF Transfer
applicable_improvements.description: Leverage HuggingFace's high-performance transfer settings to reduce model loading latency, improving RAG retrieval speed by up to 30%.

applicable_improvements.title: Implement Batch Size Automation
applicable_improvements.description: Adopt automatic batch size detection from lm_eval's --batch_size=auto feature to optimize ChromaDB query throughput and GPU utilization.

applicable_improvements.title: Integrate Task Configuration System
applicable_improvements.description: Use lm_eval's YAML-based task configuration to standardize RAG pipeline components (retrieval, reranking, generation) with versioned parameters.

applicable_improvements.title: Add Decontamination Metrics
applicable_improvements.description: Implement lm_eval's decontamination detection to prevent hallucinations in RAG generation by measuring dataset leakage.
applicable_improvements.code_hint: def calculate_leakage_score(generated_text, corpus): ... # Use cosine similarity

applicable_improvements.title: Enhance Prompt Management
applicable_improvements.description: Adopt lm_eval's prompt handling system to improve cross-encoder reranking by using standardized query templates.

applicable_improvements.title: Implement Ruff Code Quality
applicable_improvements.description: Apply lm_eval's Ruff pre-commit configuration to enforce code style consistency and catch potential bugs early.
applicable_improvements.code_hint: Add to pre-commit: - id: ruff-check, - id: ruff-format

applicable_improvements.title: Add Zeno Visualization Tools
applicable_improvements.description: Integrate lm_eval's Zeno visualization for debugging RAG performance bottlenecks in the pipeline.

improvements.description: Reduces memory fragmentation and improves training throughput by eliminating padding tokens during sequence processing.

improvements.title: Integrate DPO with LoRA for Alignment
improvements.description: TRL's DPO trainer can be combined with LoRA to fine-tune retrieval models with alignment objectives, improving relevance without full parameter updates. This leverages TRL's reinforcement learning capabilities for better query-document alignment.
improvements.code_snippet: Wrap LoRA model in DPO trainer: trainer = DPOTrainer(model=loramodel, args=dpo_args)

improvements.title: Synthetic Data Generation for Retrieval
improvements.description: Use TRL's dataset generation scripts (e.g., generate_toolcall_dataset.py) to create synthetic question-answer pairs for training embedding models and improving ChromaDB retrieval accuracy.

improvements.title: Cross-Encoder Evaluation Metrics
improvements.description: Adopt TRL's evaluation utilities (from test_rewards.py) to measure cross-encoder reranker performance with metrics like pairwise accuracy and ranking loss.

improvements.title: Experimental Trainer Optimization
improvements.description: Explore TRL's experimental/new_trainer.py for potential optimizations in distributed training or mixed-precision support that could accelerate RAG system training.

improvements.description: Use TRL's _compat.py strategies to ensure LoRA and DPO components work with older PyTorch versions, improving deployment flexibility.
improvements.code_snippet: Add version checks: if torch.__version__ < '2.0': use legacy LoRA implementation
